name: Crc_CalculateCRC16
title: Crc_CalculateCRC16
syntax: long Crc_CalculateCRC16 (BYTE* data, dword dataSize, dword dataOffset, dword crcLength, dword crcStartValue, dword firstCall, dword* crcCalculated);
description: Calculates the corresponding checksum for CRC16 based on the data. The calculation of the CRC value corresponds to AUTOSAR PROFILE_05 and PROFILE_06.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Payload data for which the checksum is to be calculated.

parameters.name: dataSize
parameters.description: Length of data block to be calculated in bytes.

parameters.name: dataOffset
parameters.description: Start index for the calculation of the CRC in the payload data.

parameters.name: crcLength
parameters.description: The length of the data for the CRC is calculated.

parameters.name: crcStartValue
parameters.description: CRC initial value depending on whether it is the first call or a subsequent call. Value is ignored if firstCall is 1.

parameters.name: firstCall
parameters.description: Flag for first call or a subsequent call. Possible values are 0 (subsequent call) or 1 (first call).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
